summary: Tested Info Pages CMS System for footer-linked info pages (Delivery, Returns, FAQ, Contact, Track, Privacy, Terms). Backend APIs working correctly. Admin UI shows Info Pages Editor in Footer section of Homepage Manager with all 7 pages. Customer-facing pages render dynamic content. Product detail page shows Delivery Information accordion with DeliveryInfoCompact component. One issue found: Footer links in database have old URLs (/shop/delivery instead of /shop/info/delivery).

Backend: GET /api/website-admin/info-pag.details: Returns page with 4 sections: cards (Delivery Highlights), text (Delivery Times), table (Delivery Rates), text (Delivery Conditions)

Backend: POST /api/website-admin/info-pa.details: Saves page and returns confirmation, verified persistence via GET

Admin: Footer section in Homepage Manage.details: Info Pages Editor visible with data-testid='info-pages-editor' below FooterEditor

Admin: Info Pages editor shows all 7 pag.details: All 7 tabs visible: Delivery Information, Returns & Refunds, Frequently Asked Questions, Contact Us, Track Your Order, Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions

Admin: Expanding a section shows editabl.details: Sections show editable content with type badges (FAQ ACCORDION, RICH TEXT, INFO CARDS, PRICING TABLE)

Admin: Save Page persists changes and th.details: Save Page button works, shows success toast 'Frequently Asked Questions saved!'

Customer: /shop/info/delivery renders De.details: Page renders with title 'Delivery Information' and all sections: Delivery Highlights (cards), Delivery Times (text), Delivery Rates (table), Delivery Conditions (text)

Customer: /shop/info/returns renders Ret.details: Page renders with title 'Returns & Refunds TEST' (test content saved via API)

Customer: /shop/info/faq renders FAQ pag.details: Page renders with title 'Frequently Asked Questions' and FAQ accordion with 2 questions

Customer: Footer links point to /shop/in.details: Footer links in saved settings use old URLs (/shop/delivery, /shop/returns, etc.) instead of new /shop/info/* routes. Code defaults are correct but saved settings override them.

Product Detail: Delivery Information acc.details: DeliveryInfoCompact component renders in accordion with Delivery Highlights cards and Delivery Times section

action_items: Update footer settings in database to use new /shop/info/* URLs for Customer Service links (Delivery Information -> /shop/info/delivery, Returns & Refunds -> /shop/info/returns, FAQs -> /shop/info/faq, Contact Us -> /shop/info/contact, Track Order -> /shop/info/track) and Legal links (Privacy Policy -> /shop/info/privacy, Terms & Conditions -> /shop/info/terms)

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 features working, 1 partial - footer links need URL update)

seed_data_creation: Delivery page already saved by main agent. Returns, FAQ, Contact pages saved during testing via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Info Pages CMS system is fully implemented. Admin can edit info pages via Homepage Manager > Footer section > Info Pages Editor. Pages saved to /api/website-admin/info-pages/{slug} (POST) and retrieved via GET (public, no auth required). Customer pages at /shop/info/{slug}. DeliveryInfoCompact component renders in product detail page accordion. Footer settings need URL update to point to /shop/info/* routes.
